# Ekko Distribution - llms.txt
# https://ekko-distribution.com

> Ekko Distribution is a French food export company specializing in high-quality essential products for African markets. Operating under the Belle Vie brand, we export frozen poultry (whole chickens, breast fillets, drumsticks, wings, leg quarters), refined sunflower oil, wheat flour T55, fresh and powdered eggs, and premium green tea. All products are Halal-certified, ISO 22000 and BRC compliant. Based in Thiais, France (9 Avenue de l'Europe, 140 Tour Europa, 94320), we serve 15+ African countries with a mastered cold chain logistics network.

## Company Information
- Name: Ekko Distribution
- Brand: Belle Vie
- Slogan: "Parce que vous méritez de bien vivre" / "Because you deserve to live well"
- Location: 9 Avenue de l'Europe, 140 Tour Europa, 94320 Thiais, France
- Contact: +33 6 49 50 62 49 | contact@ekko-distribution.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ekko-distibution
- Website: https://ekko-distribution.com
- Languages: French, English
- Markets: Africa (15+ countries)
- Industry: Food export, wholesale distribution

## Products
- Frozen Poultry: Whole chickens (700g-2500g), breast fillets, drumsticks, wings (2/3 joints), leg quarters — all Halal certified, IQF/BQF/IPBF freezing methods
- Sunflower Oil: Refined deodorized sunflower oil (1L, 1.8L, 5L bottles; 10L, 20L, 25L drums) and deep-frying sunflower oil (1L-25L)
- Wheat Flour: T55 all-purpose flour (1kg, 5kg, 10kg, 25kg, 50kg bags)
- Eggs: Fresh shell eggs (6, 15, 30 units) and spray-dried whole egg powder (1kg, 5kg, 25kg)
- Beverages: Premium green tea

## Certifications
- Halal certified
- ISO 22000
- BRC (British Retail Consortium)

## Key Differentiators
- Quality promise: "Quality is not an option, it's a promise written in our DNA"
- Family-focused: Every product selected with families in mind
- End-to-end cold chain management
- Rigorous supplier selection
- Multi-format packaging for retail and wholesale
- 5+ years of experience in African food export
